headlines.description: Stephen Eustáquio scored in second-half stoppage time, and Canada beat South Africa 1-0 to earn their first knockout match victory in a World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eustáquio heroics send Canada to WCup last-16

headlines.description: Gabriel Martinelli scored late injury time to give Brazil a 2-1 win over Japan in the round of 32 at the World Cup on Monday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brazil's Martinelli scores late winner to knock Japan out of World Cup

headlines.description: José Canale scored on the first sudden death penalty kick, Orlando Gill made two key saves in the shootout, and Paraguay upset Germany 4-3 on penalties Monday to earn the biggest upset of the 2026 World Cup so far.
headlines.shortLinkText: Paraguay upset Germany on pens, reach WC last 16

headlines.description: Netherlands knocked out of World Cup after penalty shootout loss to Morocco
headlines.shortLinkText: Netherlands out of WC after shootout loss to Morocco

headlines.description: Erling Haaland scored the deciding goal in the 86th minute as Norway won their first ever World Cup knockout match, advancing to the round of 16 with a 2-1 victory over Ivory Coast on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland strikes late to send Norway into last-16

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappé scored twice as France comfortably beat Sweden 3-0 in the World Cup round of 32.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé stars, France thump Sweden at World Cup

headlines.description: Mexico will now face either England or DR Congo in Mexico City in the Round of 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jiménez, Quiñones help Mexico past Ecuador, into R16

headlines.description: Harry Kane's brace saved England from World Cup humiliation as Thomas Tuchel's men survived an almighty scare against Congo DR.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane saves England against Congo DR at World Cup

headlines.description: Youri Tielemans saved Belgium World Cup hopes by converting a contentious penalty in added time at the end of extra time to win 3-2 having scored an 89th-minute equaliser to keep the tie alive against Senegal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Belgium stay alive, beat Senegal on Tielemans' pen

headlines.description: Folarin Balogun scored his third goal of the World Cup before being sent off with a red card, and Malik Tillman converted on a free kick to give the 10-man U.S. squad a 2-0 win over Bosnia-Herzegovina on Wednesday night to advance to the round of 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: U.S. beats Bosnia to reach World Cup round of 16

headlines.description: Mikel Oyarzabal scored twice as Spain proved too strong for Austria in a 3-0 win at the SoFi Stadium to take their place in the round of 16 of the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Oyarzabal stars, Spain KO Austria from World Cup

headlines.description: Gonçalo Ramos headed a stoppage-time winner and Josko Gvardiol had an equaliser controversially disallowed as Portugal beat Croatia 2-1 at the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Portugal eliminate Croatia at WC after VAR call

headlines.description: Breel Embolo and Dan Ndoye both scored and Switzerland advanced to the Round of 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Switzerland eliminate Algeria from WC with 2-0 win

headlines.description: Egypt recorded their first World Cup knockout victory as Australia's decision to send on goalkeeper Mat Ryan specifically for the penalty shootout failed to pay off.
headlines.shortLinkText: Egypt wins in World Cup knockout round debut with 4-2 penalty shootout over Australia

headlines.description: Diney Borges' own goal in extra time saw Argentina take the victory, as Lionel Messi extended his record with his 20th World Cup goal..
headlines.shortLinkText: Argentina beat Cape Verde 3-2 in extra time

headlines.description: Colombia booked the last place in the World Cup's round of 16 as they beat Ghana 1-0 in Kansas City. Jhon Arias grabbed the only goal after 14 minutes as the earned a meeting with Switzerland in Vancouver.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arias guides Colombia past Ghana into round of 16

headlines.description: Azzedine Ounahi scored twice in the second half as Morocco beat co-hosts Canada 3-0 in Houston to book their place in the World Cup quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Morocco send Canada crashing out of World Cup

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappé scored his 19th career World Cup goal, and France survived stifling heat to beat Paraguay 1-0 on Saturday, sending Les Bleus into the quarterfinals for the fourth straight time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé leads France to WCup quarterfinals

headlines.description: Erling Haaland struck two late goals as Norway stunned Brazil on Sunday by winning 2-1 in East Rutherford, New Jersey, to reach the World Cup quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Norway, Haaland stun Brazil to reach 1st quarters ever

headlines.description: Jude Bellingham was the star with a first-half brace, while Harry Kane's penalty would prove the difference maker.
headlines.shortLinkText: 10-man England win thriller against Mexico to reach World Cup quarterfinals

headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup dream ended in tears as Mikel Merino stepped off the bench to fire Spain into the quarterfinals with an injury-time winner in Dallas.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup career ends as Spain beat Portugal

headlines.description: The United States' hopes for a deep World Cup run at home ended when Charles De Ketelaere scored twice and assisted on another goal, helping Belgium expose the Americans' defensive liabilities in a 4-1 win Monday night that earned a quarterfinal berth.
headlines.shortLinkText: USMNT out of WCup as Belgium hit four in Seattle

headlines.description: Argentina remarkably beat Egypt 3-2 with a stoppage-time winner after turning around a two-goal deficit in the World Cup round of 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Argentina overturn two-goal deficit to beat Egypt late at World Cup

headlines.description: Rubén Vargas struck the winning spot-kick as Switzerland beat Colombia 4-3 in a penalty shoot-out to reach the World Cup quarterfinals after a goalless 120 minutes in Vancouver.
headlines.shortLinkText: Switzerland send Colombia home from World Cup after penalty shootout

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappé had a goal and an assist after missing a first-half penalty kick, Ousmane Dembélé scored the other goal and France beat Morocco 2-0 Thursday in the World Cup quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé scores 8th of WC, France beat Morocco in QF

headlines.description: Mikel Merino scored in the 88th minute on a rebound yielded by backup Belgium goalkeeper Senne Lammens, and Spain advanced to the World Cup semifinals with a 2-1 victory on Friday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lammens error sends Spain past Belgium into SF

headlines.description: Jude Bellingham scored in the third minute of extra time to lift England past Norway 2-1 and into the World Cup semifinals for the first time since 2018.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bellingham hits brace as England reach WCup semifinals

headlines.description: Julian Alvarez starred with a 112th minute strike to keep Argentina's title defence alive.
headlines.shortLinkText: Argentina survive Switzerland scare to book semifinal with England

headlines.description: Mikel Oyarzabal and Pedro Porro gave Spain a 2-0 win over France in the first semifinal of the World Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spain upset favorites France to reach WC final

headlines.description: Defending champion Argentina rallied to beat England 2-1 on Wednesday and reach the World Cup final.
headlines.shortLinkText: Argentina come from behind vs. England, reach WC final

headlines.description: England beat France 6-4 in chaotic third-place World Cup playoff on Saturday in Miami.
headlines.shortLinkText: England beat France 6-4 in chaotic third-place World Cup playoff
